
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Receipt - POS-2F0B-20260309-0001</title>
    <style>
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body {
            font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.2;
            padding: 10px;
            width: 80mm;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: #ffffff;
            color: #000000;
        }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        .text-right { text-align: right; }
        .font-bold { font-weight: bold; }
        .separator-double { margin: 5px 0; border-top: 2px double #000; }
        .separator-dashed { margin: 5px 0; border-top: 1px dashed #000; }
        .header { margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .header h1 { font-size: 1.4em; margin-bottom: 2px; }
        .header p { font-size: 0.9em; margin-bottom: 1px; }
        .items-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 5px 0; font-size: 0.9em; }
        .items-table th { border-bottom: 1px dashed #000; padding: 3px 0; text-align: left; }
        .items-table td { padding: 3px 0; vertical-align: top; }
        .totals { margin-top: 5px; }
        .total-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 1.1em; }
        .grand-total { font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 5px; padding-top: 5px; border-top: 1px dashed #000; }
        .footer { margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.9em; }
        .review-qr { margin: 10px 0; }
        .review-qr img { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="header text-center">
        <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
        <h1>MAIN BRANCH</h1>
        <p></p>
        <p>123 Main Street, Demo City, DC, 12345, USA</p>
        <p>Tel: +1234567890</p>
        
        
        <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
    </div>

    <div class="order-info">
        <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
            <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;">Bill No : POS-2F0B-20260309-0001</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
            <div>Date : 03/09/2026</div>
            <div>Time : 12:30:50 PM</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
            <div>Table : N/A</div>
            <div>Waiter: Jane Manager</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="separator-dashed">---------------------------------------</div>

    <table class="items-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th style="width: 10%;">Qty</th>
                <th style="width: 50%;">Item</th>
                <th style="width: 20%; text-align: right;">Rate</th>
                <th style="width: 20%; text-align: right;">Amount</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Coffee</td>
            <td class="text-right">4</td>
            <td class="text-right">4</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Caesar Salad</td>
            <td class="text-right">12</td>
            <td class="text-right">12</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Beef Steak</td>
            <td class="text-right">30</td>
            <td class="text-right">30</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Chicken Wings</td>
            <td class="text-right">13</td>
            <td class="text-right">13</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Ice Cream</td>
            <td class="text-right">5</td>
            <td class="text-right">5</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="separator-dashed">---------------------------------------</div>

    <div class="totals">
        <div class="total-row">
            <span>Subtotal :</span>
            <span>63.95</span>
        </div>
        
    <div class="total-row">
        <span>VAT (1.5%) :</span>
        <span>0.96</span>
    </div>
        
    <div class="total-row">
        <span>S.C (0.02%) :</span>
        <span>0.01</span>
    </div>
        
        
        
        <div class="separator-dashed">---------------------------------------</div>
        <div class="total-row grand-total">
            <span>GRAND TOTAL (BDT) :</span>
            <span>64.92</span>
        </div>
        <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
    </div>

    <div class="payment-details">
        <div>Paid by: CASH</div>
        <div>Change: 0.00 (Tendered: 65)</div>
    </div>

    <div class="separator-double" style="margin-top: 15px;">=======================================</div>

    <div class="footer text-center">
        <p>Thank you for your visit!</p>
        <p>Please come again.</p>
        <br/>
        <p style="font-size: 0.8em;">Powered by Raha Pos Solutions</p>
        <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
    </div>

    
    <div class="review-qr text-center">
        <p style="font-size: 0.7em; margin-bottom: 5px;">Scan to review your experience</p>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Review QR" />
    </div>
</body>
</html>
